title: Wave 2 Overdue - 6 Apps Incomplete
description: 6 of 10 Wave 2 apps not completed due to undiscovered dependencies and team capacity.
mitigation: Emergency sprint planned; 2 additional engineers requested from bench

title: App #17 Mainframe Dependency Unresolved
description: AS/400 mainframe integration requires API gateway design not in original scope. Potential SOW amendment needed.
mitigation: Architecture options document in review with client

title: Schedule - December Go-Live Jeopardy
description: At current velocity, only 28–30 of 35 apps deliverable by December. IPO narrative at risk.
mitigation: Scope reduction options being presented to CTO

title: Team Capacity Insufficient
description: Current 4-person delivery team cannot absorb Wave 2 recovery and maintain Wave 3 velocity.
mitigation: 2 additional engineers requested from global bench
